name: Athletes' Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the butter, vegetable oil, and brown sugar until fluffy.
2. Add the eggs, water, and vanilla extract to the mixture. Blend in well.
3. Gradually add the flour, baking soda, and salt, mixing thoroughly.
4. Fold in the raisins, Wheaties cereal, and grated zucchini until evenly distributed.
5. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan and pour in the batter.
6. Sprinkle the cinnamon and sugar mixture over the top of the bars.
7. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until set.
8. Allow the bars to cool completely before cutting into serving pieces.
